document.title: Agent Orientation
document.purpose: Lightweight startup guidance for Claude Code, ChatGPT Codex, or similar agents.

find-the-registry.instruction: Look for a registry.json file. Treat it and any linked system registry as indexes into essential reference material.
rules: If the registry references Lion's definitions file, read it.
If writing code, read Lion's programming philosophy documents first.
Do not read every resource preemptively; load what is needed for the immediate task.

notes: docs/raw/ is the canonical home for project documents.

status-files: Keep agent working files in docs/agent/.
Maintain todo.json, status.json, and judgements.json as needed.
